summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KOLOR STUDIO Client Portal feature - all backend APIs (17/17) and frontend features working correctly. Portal displays project status, progress bar, details, activity timeline, and contact section correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/portal/:token returns 200 for valid token
Backend: Portal response has correct data structure (project, status, client, timeline, files, contact, meta)
Backend: Project data includes id, title, serviceType, description, submittedAt
Backend: Status data includes current, label, description, progress (0-100), isBooked, isLost
Backend: Client data includes name and email
Backend: Contact data includes name and email
Backend: Timeline is array with proper structure (id, type, description, createdAt)
Backend: Meta data includes portalViews count and lastUpdated
Backend: GET /api/portal/:token returns 404 for invalid token with proper error message
Backend: GET /api/portal/:token returns 400 for short/invalid token format
Backend: Portal views counter increments on each access
Backend: Portal only shows client-safe activity types (no NOTE_ADDED, PHONE_CALL, INTERNAL_NOTE)
Backend: Activity descriptions are sanitized (no internal terminology)
Backend: Budget field is optional and handled correctly
Backend: Timeline field is optional and handled correctly
Backend: EventDate field is optional and handled correctly
Frontend: Portal page loads correctly at /portal/:token
Frontend: KOLOR STUDIO header visible with purple gradient
Frontend: Project title 'MINE' displayed correctly
Frontend: Status badge shows 'Inquiry Received' with animated indicator
Frontend: Progress bar shows 5 steps (Received, In Contact, Quoted, Finalizing, Confirmed)
Frontend: Current status step highlighted correctly
Frontend: Project Details section shows Service Type, Description, Budget, Timeline, Submitted date
Frontend: Recent Updates section shows activity timeline with timestamps
Frontend: Contact section shows team member name 'Emmanuel Obokoh'
Frontend: Contact Us button is mailto link with project title in subject
Frontend: Footer shows 'Visit our website' link
Frontend: Error state displays 'Portal Not Found' for invalid tokens
Frontend: Error state shows contact email
Frontend: Mobile responsive layout works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes in ClientPortal.tsx for automated testing (minor improvement)
Good: Activity descriptions sanitized for client view (no internal terminology)
Good: Portal views tracking implemented correctly
Good: Mobile responsive design with vertical progress bar on small screens
seed_data_creation: Used existing test lead 'MINE' with portal token 28a000eb-16f6-4f8a-9415-d3f7bce2307c
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Portal feature is fully functional. Portal token 28a000eb-16f6-4f8a-9415-d3f7bce2307c works for lead 'MINE'. Portal shows project progress, details, activity timeline (client-safe only), and contact section. Activity types filtered to only show: STATUS_CHANGED, EMAIL_SENT, MEETING_SCHEDULED, PROPOSAL_SENT, CONTRACT_SIGNED, FILE_UPLOADED.
